best_bet.reason: Horry's got 1 to 3 foot waves that are actually fun for beginners and paddleboarders, compared to Georgetown's flat 1 footer, and the slightly broader beach access means more space to spread out on a day this nice.

counties.name: Horry County
counties.beaches: Myrtle Beach · North Myrtle Beach · Surfside Beach · Garden City

counties.name: Georgetown County
counties.beaches: Pawleys Island · Litchfield Beach · Huntington Beach State Park
